properties.trigger_condition: lot_status = Under Recall or sterility OOS confirmed
properties.instruction_prompt: Execute the Lot Recall Initiation workflow for the affected lot. Confirm the triggering condition (OOS sterility result or recalled lot status), identify all downstream distributors and markets holding the lot, determine recall scope and classification, and produce the initial recall action plan with assigned owners and regulatory notification requirements.

Execute the Cold Chain Breach Response workflow for the affected shipment or lot. Identify the breach event, assess temperature excursion duration and severity, determine product impact, evaluate whether the lot remains releasable, and recommend hold, disposition, or replacement actions for affected inventory.

properties.trigger_condition: dscsa_compliant = FALSE or US deadline 2026-11-27 approaching
properties.instruction_prompt: Execute the DSCSA Compliance Review for the affected product or distributor. Assess serialization status, transaction data completeness, and verification gaps, identify which lots or trading partners are non-compliant, and recommend the remediation actions needed to meet the November 2026 DSCSA deadline.

properties.trigger_condition: single_source_flag = TRUE or china_dependency_flag = TRUE in mv_api_sourcing_concentration
properties.instruction_prompt: Execute the API Sourcing Concentration Review for the flagged active pharmaceutical ingredient. Identify single-source dependencies, China or FEOC exposure, alternate supplier options, and qualification status, and recommend the diversification actions needed to reduce supply concentration risk.

properties.trigger_condition: OOS result in mv_quality_test_results for sterility test
properties.instruction_prompt: Execute the Sterility Investigation workflow for the out-of-specification result. Identify the affected lot, manufacturing site, and production batch, trace root cause hypotheses, determine patient risk and regulatory notification requirements, and recommend investigation steps and containment actions.

properties.trigger_condition: new market approval required or label update
properties.instruction_prompt: Execute the Regulatory Filing Submission workflow for the new market or label change. Identify the filing requirement, review data package readiness, check market-specific dossier gaps, and produce a submission-ready action plan with target dates and responsible owners.

Execute the Lot Traceability Review for the lot with an incomplete chain of custody. Identify the missing transaction records, locate where the traceability gap occurred, determine downstream exposure, and recommend the data remediation and verification steps needed to restore full DSCSA-compliant traceability.

Use lot traceability, manufacturing site, and distributor data to verify chain of custody completeness. Identify traceability gaps, trace lot movement from manufacture to distribution, and flag any breaks in the transaction record that create DSCSA or recall risk.

Use cold chain monitoring, lot master, and distributor data to detect and assess temperature excursions. Determine breach severity, affected lot disposition risk, and downstream exposure, and return recommendations for product hold, replacement, or release with conditions.

Use recall impact, traceability, regulatory market, and distributor data to scope and execute drug product recalls. Identify all affected lots, markets, and trading partners, determine regulatory notification requirements, and recommend the fastest containment path.

Use DSCSA compliance status, lot master, distributor, and market data to assess serialization and verification readiness. Identify non-compliant lots, trading partners, or markets, and recommend the actions needed to achieve full DSCSA compliance before the regulatory deadline.

capabilities: lead time and safety stock analysis
properties.instruction_prompt: Use API sourcing concentration and supplier quality risk data to assess active pharmaceutical ingredient supply vulnerability. Identify single-source dependencies, geographic concentration, FEOC exposure, and supplier performance gaps, and recommend sourcing diversification or qualification actions.

Use compliance status, regulatory market, and product master data to evaluate filing readiness for new market entries or label changes. Identify missing dossier elements, market-specific requirements, and timeline risks, and produce a prioritized submission action plan.

data_sources.description: Pharmaceutical product master data including cold chain, serialization, and regulatory requirements
Full lot-level traceability chain from API manufacturing to pharmacy/patient delivery
Unified view tracing each lot from API supplier through manufacturing, distribution to patient with compliance flags
DSCSA and global serialization compliance status by lot and market — serialization, EPCIS, trading partner data
QC test results per lot including identity, assay, purity, sterility, endotoxin, and particulate tests
Recall impact analysis with root cause, affected lots, patients exposed, and trace-back time metrics
Recall trace-back view with efficiency rating showing Context Graph vs manual process speed
API supplier master with tier, country, FDA registration, FEOC and sanctions flags
Supplier quality risk metrics including FDA warning letters, import alerts, OOS incidents, and CAPA counts
Combined supplier risk view aggregating quality score, FDA actions, FEOC status, and audit findings
GMP and quality system audit results with critical, major, minor findings and CAPA status
API sourcing concentration risk — single source flags, China dependency, lead times, safety stock days
Supplier scope 1 and scope 2 carbon emissions for sustainability reporting
Manufacturing site master data with GMP, FDA, EMA certification status and capacity utilization
Cold chain temperature monitoring events with excursion detection and corrective actions
Cold chain excursion summary per lot with disposition recommendation (quarantine vs. stable)
Shipment-level distribution tracking with on-time delivery and cold chain maintenance flags
Product regulatory filing status (NDA/BLA/MAA) by market with pending changes tracking
